title: astilbe microphylla var. intermedia
intro: Astilbe microphylla var. intermedia is a variety of the astilbe plant, commonly known as false goat's beard, which is a type of flowering perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antacid. The herbal preparations of Astilbe microphylla var. intermedia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
